text: Learning a new skill takes time, but breaking it into small steps makes it manageable. First, gather useful resources like online tutorials, books, or apps to guide you. Then, set a regular practice schedule—even 15 minutes daily helps. Patience is essential because mistakes are part of the process. Track your progress by noting what you’ve improved each week; this keeps you motivated. Celebrate small wins, like finishing a simple project or understanding a difficult concept. When motivation drops, remind yourself why you started. With consistent effort and the right tools, you’ll see steady growth.
